idea-plugin.name: JARVIS Observability
idea-plugin.description:
Read-only observability surface for the JARVIS Ouroboros governance loop.

Provides a JARVIS Ops tool window that subscribes to the agent's Server-Sent Events stream and shows a live view of per-op TaskBoard state. Companion to the VS Code / Cursor extension (Slice 3) and Sublime Text plugin (Slice 5) — all three clients consume the same schema-v1.0 HTTP GET + SSE surface.

Authority invariant: this plugin is read-only. It never POSTs to the agent. Mirrors the server-side §1 Boundary Principle on the client side.

Requires a locally-running JARVIS EventChannelServer with JARVIS_IDE_OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED and JARVIS_IDE_STREAM_ENABLED at their graduated (2026-04-20) defaults.
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.0: Initial release — Slice 6 of Gap #6. Tool window + tree + status bar + action group. Kotlin coroutines-driven SSE consumer with exponential backoff and Last-Event-ID resume.
